description: A three-quarter-length portrait of a young woman seated in a simple wooden chair against a mottled red background. She has abundant dark curly hair worn loose and wears a dark black dress with a white fichu (neck cloth) at the bodice and a blue sash tied at the waist. Her hands rest in her lap, one upon the other. Her expression is calm and composed, with a slight turn of the head. The painting style is refined and naturalistic, characteristic of late 18th-century French portraiture, with careful attention to the textures of fabric, skin, and hair.
